description.initial: You swim through the mid-western reaches of the Underwater Realm. The water here is filled with swaying forests of long seaweed, creating a green-gold maze. Fish of every color dart between the kelp, and you can see larger shapes moving in the deeper waters beyond.
description.return: The kelp forests of the mid-western underwater realm.
description.atmospheric: Sunlight filters through the kelp, creating shifting patterns of light and shadow. The water hums with life.

items.itemMessage: You drink from a freshwater vent rising through the ocean floor. Cold and clean despite the salt water surrounding it.

interactables.name: Giant Kelp
interactables.examineText: Massive strands of seaweed rise from the ocean floor, some reaching fifty feet or more. They sway gently in the current, creating an underwater forest.
